title: F&A Variants Pack
description: A Resource Pack adding variants for the prehistoric animals in Fossils & Archeology: Revival
body:
**This is a Resource Pack for the Fossils & Archaeology: Revival Mod that adds simple recolors as variants so you can spruce up your parks with some more variety!**

Currently includes variants for:
- Pteranodon
- Megalodon
- Velociraptor
- Spinosaurus
- Triceratops
- Sarcosuchus
- Megalania
- Dimetrodon
- Platybelodon
- Coelacanth
- Nautilus
- Quetzalcoatlus
- Pachycephalosaurus
- Tyrannosaurus
- Ankylosaurus
- Allosaurus
- Tiktaalik
- Therizinosaurus
- Ceratosaurus
- Arthropleura
- Mammoth
- Smilodon
- Citipati
- Parasaurolophus
- Deinonychus
- Henodus
- Diplocaulus
- Confuciusornis
- Postosuchus
- Diplodocus
- Brachiosaurus
﻿
- Psittacosaurus
